attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
  MTRBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,     
  MTRBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
  MTRBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE, MTRBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  MTRBM.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
   
  CASE WHEN MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y'   AND MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0 
     THEN
         CASE WHEN COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL  THEN     
                 COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY)
             WHEN COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT) IS NOT NULL THEN
                 COALESCE(L4_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L3_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L2_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L1_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,-999) 
                 ELSE -999 
         END 
 ELSE -999 END TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,
 
   CASE WHEN MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y'  AND MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0 
   THEN
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL  
       THEN  
     CAST( (MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT - (COALESCE(TSS.COST_FACTOR_PCT,TSS1.COST_FACTOR_PCT)*
       (CASE WHEN DOLLAR_ADJUSTABLE_FLG='Y' THEN MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ELSE MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT END)/100)    
      )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )   
    WHEN COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT) IS NOT NULL 
    THEN
     CAST( (MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT *
      (COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT)/100) )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )  
    ELSE 0
   END 
  ELSE 0
  END       DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT,
 
   CASE WHEN (MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y'   AND MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0 AND MCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NOT NULL )
   THEN
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL  
     THEN  
      CAST( ( (COALESCE(TSS.COST_FACTOR_PCT,TSS1.COST_FACTOR_PCT)*
       (CASE WHEN DOLLAR_ADJUSTABLE_FLG='Y' THEN MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ELSE MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT END)/100)    
       )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )   
     WHEN COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT) IS NOT NULL 
     THEN
      CAST( /* MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT * */
   COALESCE((COALESCE(MCR.ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RT,0)/NULLIF(MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT,0))*MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,0) *
       (COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT))/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6) )  
     ELSE 0
    END 
   ELSE 0
   END  DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT,
 
 CASE WHEN (MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y' AND MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0 AND 
 COALESCE(COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY),L4_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L3_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L2_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L1_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL )
 THEN COALESCE((COALESCE(MCR.ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RT,0)/NULLIF(MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT,0))*MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,0)  
     
 ELSE 0
 END AS DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
 /*REBATE BGM NET START */
CASE WHEN MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y' AND MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0 
	THEN
		CASE WHEN COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL  
			THEN 	
				CAST( (MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT - (COALESCE(TSS.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,TSS1.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT) * MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT /100)    
					)  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )   
			WHEN COALESCE(L4_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,0) <> 0
			THEN
				CAST( (MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT *
					(COALESCE(L4_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT)/100) )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )		
			ELSE  MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
		END 
	ELSE  0
 END DV_BKG_REBATE,

CASE WHEN (MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y' AND DV_BKG_REBATE <> 0 AND 
COALESCE(COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY),L4_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L3_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L2_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L1_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL )
THEN COALESCE((COALESCE(MCR.ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RT,0)/NULLIF(MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT,0))*DV_BKG_REBATE,0) 
ELSE 0
END AS DV_FX_REBATE_PRICE_AMT
/*REBATE BGM NET END */

    
 FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE   MTRBM
 
 INNER JOIN $$WORKDB.W_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE WRBM
 ON MTRBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY =WRBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          
 AND MTRBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE=WRBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
 AND MTRBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=WRBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
  
 
 INNER JOIN (
 SELECT RFDTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDTY WHERE   RFDTY.CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLAG        = 'Y' 
 UNION  
 SELECT RFDTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDTY WHERE  RFDTY.PREVIOUS_FISCAL_QTR_FLAG   = 'Y' 
 AND  1 =(  SELECT COUNT(*)   FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_QUARTER_TO_YEAR RFQTY WHERE DATE= RFQTY.FISCAL_QUARTER_START_DATE  AND RFQTY.CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLAG ='Y')
 ) FISC_MTH ON FISC_MTH.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = MTRBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
 
 
 LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP ON MTRBM.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY    
 
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ENDCUST_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER ENDCUST ON MTRBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=ENDCUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY   
 
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY HIER ON MTRBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=HIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR TSS
ON TSS.PRODUCT_KEY                    = MTRBM.PRODUCT_KEY
AND TSS.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD = ENDCUST.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD                    
AND TSS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='ERP' 
AND TSS.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
AND TSS.COUNTRY_FLG='Y'

LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR TSS1
ON TSS1.PRODUCT_KEY                    = MTRBM.PRODUCT_KEY
AND TSS1.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD = ENDCUST.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD                    
AND TSS1.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='ERP' 
AND TSS1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
AND TSS1.COUNTRY_FLG='Y'

 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  L4_TSD ON L4_TSD.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
  AND L4_TSD.COUNTRY_FLG='N'
 
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  L3_TSD ON L3_TSD.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
  AND L3_TSD.COUNTRY_FLG='N'
 
 
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  L2_TSD ON L2_TSD.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
  AND L2_TSD.COUNTRY_FLG='N'
 
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  L1_TSD ON L1_TSD.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
  AND L1_TSD.COUNTRY_FLG='N'
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN
 (
 SELECT CR.PL_CONVERSION_RT,CR.ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RT,CR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,FX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_MONTHLY_CONVERSION_RATE CR,
 $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_PROFITABILITY_FX_NORM FX,
 (SELECT (PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT-5)*100+PDATE.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS START_DATE,       
     CASE WHEN PDATE.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT = 12 THEN (PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT+1)*100+1 ELSE PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT+1  END AS END_DATE
     FROM $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL PDATE
     )PDATE
 WHERE  CR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CD=FX.BK_CURRENCY_CD
 AND CR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT   BETWEEN PDATE.START_DATE AND PDATE.END_DATE
 AND CR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CD='USD'
 )MCR   
 ON MTRBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=MCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AND  MTRBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=MCR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT   
 
 WHERE WRBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'ERP' 
  AND WRBM.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG  ='N'   
  AND WRBM.SERVICE_FLG  ='Y' 
  AND  WRBM.ACTION_CODE = 'U'
  
  
  UNION
  
  
  
  SELECT
  MTRBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,     
  MTRBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
  MTRBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
   MTRBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  MTRBM.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
   
  MTRBM.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,
 
   CASE WHEN MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y'  AND MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0 
   THEN
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL  
       THEN  
     CAST( (MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT - (COALESCE(TSS.COST_FACTOR_PCT,TSS1.COST_FACTOR_PCT)*
       (CASE WHEN DOLLAR_ADJUSTABLE_FLG='Y' THEN MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ELSE MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT END)/100)    
      )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )   
    WHEN COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT) IS NOT NULL 
    THEN
     CAST( (MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT *
      (COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT)/100) )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )  
    ELSE 0
   END 
  ELSE 0
  END       DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT,
 
   CASE WHEN (MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y'   AND MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0 AND MCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NOT NULL )
   THEN
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL  
     THEN  
      CAST( ( (COALESCE(TSS.COST_FACTOR_PCT,TSS1.COST_FACTOR_PCT)*
       (CASE WHEN DOLLAR_ADJUSTABLE_FLG='Y' THEN MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ELSE MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT END)/100)    
       )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )   
     WHEN COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT) IS NOT NULL 
     THEN
      CAST( /* MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT * */
   COALESCE((COALESCE(MCR.ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RT,0)/NULLIF(MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT,0))*MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,0) *
       (COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT))/100 AS DECIMAL(18,6) )  
     ELSE 0
    END 
   ELSE 0
   END  DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT,
 
 CASE WHEN (MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y' AND MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0 AND 
 COALESCE(COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY),L4_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L3_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L2_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L1_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL )
 THEN COALESCE((COALESCE(MCR.ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RT,0)/NULLIF(MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT,0))*MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,0)  
     
 ELSE 0
 END AS DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 /*REBATE BGM NET START */
CASE WHEN MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y' AND MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0 
	THEN
		CASE WHEN COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL  
			THEN 	
				CAST( (MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT - (COALESCE(TSS.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,TSS1.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT) * MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT /100)    
					)  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )   
			WHEN COALESCE(L4_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,0) <> 0
			THEN
				CAST( (MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT *
					(COALESCE(L4_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT)/100) )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )		
			ELSE  MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
		END 
	ELSE  0
 END DV_BKG_REBATE,

CASE WHEN (MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y' AND DV_BKG_REBATE <> 0 AND 
COALESCE(COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY),L4_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L3_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L2_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L1_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL )
THEN COALESCE((COALESCE(MCR.ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RT,0)/NULLIF(MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT,0))*DV_BKG_REBATE,0) 
ELSE 0
END AS DV_FX_REBATE_PRICE_AMT
/*REBATE BGM NET END */
 
 
    
 FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE   MTRBM
 
 INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  NTPCF ON NTPCF.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY = MTRBM.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY  
 
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_PRDT_COST_FACT_EXTRT_DT  WIPCFED ON WIPCFED.JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_MT_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE' 
 AND NTPCF.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > WIPCFED.LAST_EXTRACT_DATE  AND NTPCF.EDW_CREATE_DTM <=  WIPCFED.LAST_EXTRACT_DATE
  
 
 INNER JOIN (
 SELECT RFDTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDTY WHERE   RFDTY.CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLAG        = 'Y' 
 UNION  
 SELECT RFDTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDTY WHERE  RFDTY.PREVIOUS_FISCAL_QTR_FLAG   = 'Y' 
 AND  1 =(  SELECT COUNT(*)   FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_QUARTER_TO_YEAR RFQTY WHERE DATE= RFQTY.FISCAL_QUARTER_START_DATE  AND RFQTY.CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLAG ='Y')
 ) FISC_MTH ON FISC_MTH.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = MTRBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
 
 
 LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP ON MTRBM.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY    
 
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ENDCUST_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER ENDCUST ON MTRBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=ENDCUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY   
 
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY HIER ON MTRBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=HIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR TSS
ON TSS.PRODUCT_KEY                    = MTRBM.PRODUCT_KEY
AND TSS.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD = ENDCUST.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD                    
AND TSS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='ERP' 
AND TSS.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
AND TSS.COUNTRY_FLG='Y'

LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR TSS1
ON TSS1.PRODUCT_KEY                    = MTRBM.PRODUCT_KEY
AND TSS1.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD = ENDCUST.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD                    
AND TSS1.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='ERP' 
AND TSS1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
AND TSS1.COUNTRY_FLG='Y'
 
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  L4_TSD ON L4_TSD.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
  AND L4_TSD.COUNTRY_FLG='N'
 
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  L3_TSD ON L3_TSD.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
  AND L3_TSD.COUNTRY_FLG='N'
 
 
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  L2_TSD ON L2_TSD.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
  AND L2_TSD.COUNTRY_FLG='N'
 
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  L1_TSD ON L1_TSD.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
  AND L1_TSD.COUNTRY_FLG='N'
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN
 (
 SELECT CR.PL_CONVERSION_RT,CR.ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RT,CR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,FX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_MONTHLY_CONVERSION_RATE CR,
 $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_PROFITABILITY_FX_NORM FX,
 (SELECT (PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT-5)*100+PDATE.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS START_DATE,       
     CASE WHEN PDATE.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT = 12 THEN (PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT+1)*100+1 ELSE PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT+1  END AS END_DATE
     FROM $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL PDATE
     )PDATE
 WHERE  CR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CD=FX.BK_CURRENCY_CD
 AND CR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT   BETWEEN PDATE.START_DATE AND PDATE.END_DATE
 AND CR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CD='USD'
 )MCR   
 ON MTRBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=MCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AND  MTRBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=MCR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT   
 
 WHERE MTRBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'ERP' 
  AND MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG  ='Y' 
  AND MTRBM.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG  ='N'
  
 UNION 
 
   
   SELECT
   MTRBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,     
   MTRBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
   MTRBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
    MTRBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
   MTRBM.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
    
  CASE WHEN MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y'   AND MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0 
     THEN
         CASE WHEN COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL  THEN     
                 COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY)
             WHEN COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT) IS NOT NULL THEN

,WRBM.LINKED_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
,WRBM.SK_ACQ_OPTY_LINE_ID
 FROM  $$WORKDB.W_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE  WRBM
 WHERE WRBM.ACTION_CODE IN ('I','R') 
 AND   WRBM.DML_TYPE IN ('I','R')

SELECT
  MTRBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,     
  MTRBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
  MTRBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
  MTRBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  MTRBM.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 
 CASE WHEN MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y'   AND MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0 
     THEN
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL  THEN     
                 COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY)
             WHEN COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT) IS NOT NULL THEN
                 COALESCE(L4_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L3_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L2_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L1_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,-999) 
             ELSE -999 
   END 
  ELSE -999
 END TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,
 
 CASE WHEN MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y'   AND MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0 
     THEN
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL  
    THEN  
     CAST( (MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT - (COALESCE(TSS.COST_FACTOR_PCT,TSS1.COST_FACTOR_PCT) * MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT /100)    
      )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )   
    WHEN COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT) IS NOT NULL 
    THEN
     CAST( (MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT *
      (COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT)/100) )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )  
    ELSE 0
   END       
  ELSE 0
 END  DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT,
 
  CASE WHEN (MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y'   AND MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0  AND MCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NOT NULL )
      THEN
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL  
     THEN  
      CAST( ( (COALESCE(TSS.COST_FACTOR_PCT,TSS1.COST_FACTOR_PCT)*MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT /100)    
      )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )   
     WHEN COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT) IS NOT NULL 
     THEN
      CAST( /* MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT * */
   COALESCE((COALESCE(MCR.ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RT,0)/NULLIF(MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT,0))*MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,0) *
       (COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT))/100 
      AS DECIMAL(18,6) )  
     ELSE 0
    END 
   ELSE 0
  END DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT,
 
 CASE  WHEN (MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y' AND MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0 AND 
    COALESCE(COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY),L4_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L3_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L2_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L1_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL )
   THEN COALESCE((COALESCE(MCR.ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RT,0)/NULLIF(MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT,0))*MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,0)  
   ELSE 0
 END AS DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT,
/*REBATE BGM NET START */
CASE WHEN MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y' AND MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0 
	THEN
		CASE WHEN COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL  
			THEN 	
				CAST( (MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT - (COALESCE(TSS.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,TSS1.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT) * MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT /100)    
					)  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )   
			WHEN COALESCE(L4_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,0) <> 0
			THEN
				CAST( (MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT *
					(COALESCE(L4_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT)/100) )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )		
			ELSE  MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
		END 
	ELSE  0
 END DV_BKG_REBATE,

CASE WHEN (MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y' AND DV_BKG_REBATE <> 0 AND 
COALESCE(COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY),L4_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L3_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L2_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L1_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL )
THEN COALESCE((COALESCE(MCR.ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RT,0)/NULLIF(MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT,0))*DV_BKG_REBATE,0) 
ELSE 0
END AS DV_FX_REBATE_PRICE_AMT
/*REBATE BGM NET END */ 
    
 FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE   MTRBM
 
 INNER JOIN $$WORKDB.W_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE WRBM
 ON MTRBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY =WRBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          
 AND MTRBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE=WRBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
 AND MTRBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=WRBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
 
 INNER JOIN (
 SELECT RFDTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDTY WHERE   RFDTY.CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLAG        = 'Y' 
 UNION  
 SELECT RFDTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDTY WHERE  RFDTY.PREVIOUS_FISCAL_QTR_FLAG   = 'Y' 
 AND  1 =(  SELECT COUNT(*)   FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_QUARTER_TO_YEAR RFQTY WHERE DATE= RFQTY.FISCAL_QUARTER_START_DATE  AND RFQTY.CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLAG ='Y')
 ) FISC_MTH ON FISC_MTH.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = MTRBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
 
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ENDCUST_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER ENDCUST ON MTRBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=ENDCUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY   
 
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY HIER ON MTRBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=HIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 
 
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR TSS
ON TSS.PRODUCT_KEY                    = MTRBM.PRODUCT_KEY
AND TSS.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD = ENDCUST.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD                    
AND TSS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='POS' 
AND TSS.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
AND TSS.COUNTRY_FLG='Y'

LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR TSS1
ON TSS1.PRODUCT_KEY                    = MTRBM.PRODUCT_KEY
AND TSS1.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD = ENDCUST.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD                    
AND TSS1.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='POS' 
AND TSS1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
AND TSS1.COUNTRY_FLG='Y'

 
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  L4_TSD ON L4_TSD.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
  AND L4_TSD.COUNTRY_FLG='N'
 
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  L3_TSD ON L3_TSD.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
  AND L3_TSD.COUNTRY_FLG='N'
 
 
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  L2_TSD ON L2_TSD.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
  AND L2_TSD.COUNTRY_FLG='N'
 
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  L1_TSD ON L1_TSD.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
  AND L1_TSD.COUNTRY_FLG='N'
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN
 (
 SELECT CR.PL_CONVERSION_RT,CR.ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RT,CR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,FX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_MONTHLY_CONVERSION_RATE CR,
 $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_PROFITABILITY_FX_NORM FX,
 (SELECT (PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT-5)*100+PDATE.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS START_DATE,       
     CASE WHEN PDATE.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT = 12 THEN (PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT+1)*100+1 ELSE PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT+1  END AS END_DATE
     FROM $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL PDATE
     )PDATE
 WHERE  CR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CD=FX.BK_CURRENCY_CD
 AND CR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT   BETWEEN PDATE.START_DATE AND PDATE.END_DATE
 AND CR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CD='USD'
 )MCR   
 ON MTRBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=MCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AND  MTRBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=MCR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT   
 
 WHERE WRBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS' 
  AND WRBM.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG  ='N'   
  AND WRBM.SERVICE_FLG  ='Y' 
  AND  WRBM.ACTION_CODE = 'U'
   
  
  UNION
  
  
  
  SELECT
  MTRBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,     
  MTRBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
  MTRBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,  
 MTRBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  MTRBM.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
   
  MTRBM.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,
 
  CASE WHEN MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y'   AND MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0 
     THEN
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL  
    THEN  
     CAST( (MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT - (COALESCE(TSS.COST_FACTOR_PCT,TSS1.COST_FACTOR_PCT) * MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT /100)    
      )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )   
    WHEN COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT) IS NOT NULL 
    THEN
     CAST( (MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT *
      (COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT)/100) )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )  
    ELSE 0
   END       
  ELSE 0
 END  DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT,
 
  CASE WHEN (MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y'   AND MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0  AND MCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NOT NULL )
      THEN
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL  
     THEN  
      CAST( ( (COALESCE(TSS.COST_FACTOR_PCT,TSS1.COST_FACTOR_PCT)*MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT /100)    
      )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )   
     WHEN COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT) IS NOT NULL 
     THEN
      CAST( /* MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT * */
   COALESCE((COALESCE(MCR.ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RT,0)/NULLIF(MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT,0))*MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,0) *
       (COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT))/100 
      AS DECIMAL(18,6) )  
     ELSE 0
    END 
   ELSE 0
  END DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT,
 
 CASE  WHEN (MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y' AND MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0 AND 
    COALESCE(COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY),L4_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L3_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L2_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L1_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL )
   THEN COALESCE((COALESCE(MCR.ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RT,0)/NULLIF(MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT,0))*MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,0)  
   ELSE 0
 END AS DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
 /*REBATE BGM NET START */
CASE WHEN MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y' AND MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0 
	THEN
		CASE WHEN COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL  
			THEN 	
				CAST( (MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT - (COALESCE(TSS.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,TSS1.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT) * MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT /100)    
					)  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )   
			WHEN COALESCE(L4_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,0) <> 0
			THEN
				CAST( (MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT *
					(COALESCE(L4_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT)/100) )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )		
			ELSE  MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
		END 
	ELSE  0
 END DV_BKG_REBATE,

CASE WHEN (MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y' AND DV_BKG_REBATE <> 0 AND 
COALESCE(COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY),L4_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L3_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L2_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L1_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL )
THEN COALESCE((COALESCE(MCR.ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RT,0)/NULLIF(MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT,0))*DV_BKG_REBATE,0) 
ELSE 0
END AS DV_FX_REBATE_PRICE_AMT
/*REBATE BGM NET END */
    
 FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE   MTRBM
 
 INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  NTPCF ON NTPCF.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY = MTRBM.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY  
 
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_PRDT_COST_FACT_EXTRT_DT  WIPCFED ON WIPCFED.JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_MT_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE' 
 AND NTPCF.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > WIPCFED.LAST_EXTRACT_DATE  AND NTPCF.EDW_CREATE_DTM <=  WIPCFED.LAST_EXTRACT_DATE
  
 
 INNER JOIN (
 SELECT RFDTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDTY WHERE   RFDTY.CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLAG        = 'Y' 
 UNION  
 SELECT RFDTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDTY WHERE  RFDTY.PREVIOUS_FISCAL_QTR_FLAG   = 'Y' 
 AND  1 =(  SELECT COUNT(*)   FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_QUARTER_TO_YEAR RFQTY WHERE DATE= RFQTY.FISCAL_QUARTER_START_DATE  AND RFQTY.CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLAG ='Y')
 ) FISC_MTH ON FISC_MTH.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = MTRBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
 
 
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ENDCUST_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER ENDCUST ON MTRBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=ENDCUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY   
 
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY HIER ON MTRBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=HIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR TSS
ON TSS.PRODUCT_KEY                    = MTRBM.PRODUCT_KEY
AND TSS.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD = ENDCUST.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD                    
AND TSS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='POS' 
AND TSS.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
AND TSS.COUNTRY_FLG='Y'

LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR TSS1
ON TSS1.PRODUCT_KEY                    = MTRBM.PRODUCT_KEY
AND TSS1.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD = ENDCUST.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD                    
AND TSS1.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='POS' 
AND TSS1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
AND TSS1.COUNTRY_FLG='Y'
 
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  L4_TSD ON L4_TSD.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
  AND L4_TSD.COUNTRY_FLG='N'
 
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  L3_TSD ON L3_TSD.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
  AND L3_TSD.COUNTRY_FLG='N'
 
 
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  L2_TSD ON L2_TSD.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
  AND L2_TSD.COUNTRY_FLG='N'
 
 LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  L1_TSD ON L1_TSD.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
  AND L1_TSD.COUNTRY_FLG='N'
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN
 (
 SELECT CR.PL_CONVERSION_RT,CR.ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RT,CR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,FX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_MONTHLY_CONVERSION_RATE CR,
 $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_PROFITABILITY_FX_NORM FX,
 (SELECT (PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT-5)*100+PDATE.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS START_DATE,       
     CASE WHEN PDATE.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT = 12 THEN (PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT+1)*100+1 ELSE PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT+1  END AS END_DATE
     FROM $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL PDATE
     )PDATE
 WHERE  CR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CD=FX.BK_CURRENCY_CD
 AND CR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT   BETWEEN PDATE.START_DATE AND PDATE.END_DATE
 AND CR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CD='USD'
 )MCR   
 ON MTRBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=MCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AND  MTRBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=MCR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT   
 
 WHERE MTRBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS' 
  AND MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG  ='Y' 
  AND MTRBM.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG  ='N'
  
  
  UNION
   
   
   
   SELECT
   MTRBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,     
   MTRBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
   MTRBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,  
  MTRBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
   MTRBM.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
    
 CASE WHEN MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y'   AND MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0 
     THEN
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL  THEN     
                 COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY)
             WHEN COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT) IS NOT NULL THEN
                 COALESCE(L4_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L3_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L2_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L1_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,-999) 
             ELSE -999 
   END 
  ELSE -999
 END TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,
  
   CASE WHEN MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y'   AND MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0 
      THEN
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL  
     THEN  
      CAST( (MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT - (COALESCE(TSS.COST_FACTOR_PCT,TSS1.COST_FACTOR_PCT) * MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT /100)    
       )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )   
     WHEN COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT) IS NOT NULL 
     THEN
      CAST( (MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT *
       (COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT)/100) )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )  
     ELSE 0
    END       
   ELSE 0
  END  DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT,
  
  CASE WHEN (MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y'   AND MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0  AND MCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY IS NOT NULL )
      THEN
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL  
     THEN  
      CAST( ( (COALESCE(TSS.COST_FACTOR_PCT,TSS1.COST_FACTOR_PCT)*MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT /100)    
      )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )   
     WHEN COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT) IS NOT NULL 
     THEN
      CAST( /* MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT * */
   COALESCE((COALESCE(MCR.ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RT,0)/NULLIF(MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT,0))*MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,0) *
       (COALESCE(L4_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.COST_FACTOR_PCT))/100 
      AS DECIMAL(18,6) )  
     ELSE 0
    END 
   ELSE 0
  END DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT,
  
  CASE  WHEN (MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y' AND MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0 AND 
     COALESCE(COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY),L4_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L3_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L2_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY,L1_TSD.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL )
    THEN COALESCE((COALESCE(MCR.ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RT,0)/NULLIF(MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT,0))*MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,0)  
    ELSE 0
  END AS DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
  /*REBATE BGM NET START */
CASE WHEN MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y' AND MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT <> 0 
	THEN
		CASE WHEN COALESCE(TSS.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, TSS1.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY) IS NOT NULL  
			THEN 	
				CAST( (MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT - (COALESCE(TSS.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,TSS1.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT) * MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT /100)    
					)  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )   
			WHEN COALESCE(L4_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,0) <> 0
			THEN
				CAST( (MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT *
					(COALESCE(L4_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT)/100) )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )		
			ELSE  MTRBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
		END 
	ELSE  0
 END DV_BKG_REBATE,

CASE WHEN (MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG = 'Y' AND DV_BKG_REBATE <> 0 AND 
COALESCE(COALESCE(TSS.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,TSS1.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT),L4_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L3_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L2_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT,L1_TSD.REBATE_FACTOR_PCT) IS NOT NULL )
THEN COALESCE((COALESCE(MCR.ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RT,0)/NULLIF(MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT,0))*DV_BKG_REBATE,0) 
ELSE 0
END AS DV_FX_REBATE_PRICE_AMT
/*REBATE BGM NET END */
     
  FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE   MTRBM
  
  
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ENDCUST_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER ENDCUST ON MTRBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY=ENDCUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY  
  
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_PRDT_COST_FACT_EXTRT_DT  WIPCFED ON WIPCFED.JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_MT_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE_ENDCOUNTRY' 
  AND ENDCUST.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > WIPCFED.LAST_EXTRACT_DATE  AND ENDCUST.EDW_CREATE_DTM <=  WIPCFED.LAST_EXTRACT_DATE
   
  
  INNER JOIN (
  SELECT RFDTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDTY WHERE   RFDTY.CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLAG        = 'Y' 
  UNION  
  SELECT RFDTY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDTY WHERE  RFDTY.PREVIOUS_FISCAL_QTR_FLAG   = 'Y' 
  AND  1 =(  SELECT COUNT(*)   FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_QUARTER_TO_YEAR RFQTY WHERE DATE= RFQTY.FISCAL_QUARTER_START_DATE  AND RFQTY.CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLAG ='Y')
  ) FISC_MTH ON FISC_MTH.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = MTRBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
  
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY HIER ON MTRBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=HIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY

LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR TSS
ON TSS.PRODUCT_KEY                    = MTRBM.PRODUCT_KEY
AND TSS.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD = ENDCUST.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD                    
AND TSS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='POS' 
AND TSS.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
AND TSS.COUNTRY_FLG='Y'

LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR TSS1
ON TSS1.PRODUCT_KEY                    = MTRBM.PRODUCT_KEY
AND TSS1.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD = ENDCUST.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD                    
AND TSS1.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='POS' 
AND TSS1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
AND TSS1.COUNTRY_FLG='Y'
  
  LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  L4_TSD ON L4_TSD.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
   AND L4_TSD.COUNTRY_FLG='N'
  
  LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  L3_TSD ON L3_TSD.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
   AND L3_TSD.COUNTRY_FLG='N'
  
  
  LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  L2_TSD ON L2_TSD.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
   AND L2_TSD.COUNTRY_FLG='N'
  
  LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_TSS_PRODUCT_COST_FACTOR  L1_TSD ON L1_TSD.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME=HIER.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
   AND L1_TSD.COUNTRY_FLG='N'
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN
  (
  SELECT CR.PL_CONVERSION_RT,CR.ANNUAL_BUDGET_CONV_RT,CR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,FX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_MONTHLY_CONVERSION_RATE CR,
  $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_PROFITABILITY_FX_NORM FX,
  (SELECT (PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT-5)*100+PDATE.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS START_DATE,       
      CASE WHEN PDATE.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT = 12 THEN (PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT+1)*100+1 ELSE PDATE.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT+1  END AS END_DATE
      FROM $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL PDATE
      )PDATE
  WHERE  CR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CD=FX.BK_CURRENCY_CD
  AND CR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT   BETWEEN PDATE.START_DATE AND PDATE.END_DATE
  AND CR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CD='USD'
  )MCR   
  ON MTRBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=MCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AND  MTRBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=MCR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT   
  
  WHERE MTRBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'POS' 
   AND MTRBM.SERVICE_FLG  ='Y' 
   AND MTRBM.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG  ='N'
